description_long: This object consists of four rectangular parcels, each with a clean, white exterior and subtle blue and gray printed text and graphics. The parcels are arranged in two pairs, with each pair stacked side by side, and all boxes have a smooth, matte finish. The visible text includes the words 'FRESH TISSUE' and some barcode-like graphics, suggesting these are packages of tissue paper. The boxes are uniform in size and shape, with sharp edges and flat surfaces, and appear to be made of lightweight cardboard. The top faces of the parcels display product branding and a stylized tissue illustration, while the sides show additional labeling. The overall appearance is modern and minimalistic, suitable for retail or delivery contexts in urban environments.
description: A set of four white rectangular tissue parcels with blue and gray branding, featuring smooth, matte surfaces and modern, minimalistic packaging.
description_view_0: Two pairs of white rectangular parcels are visible from above, showing the top faces with blue and gray branding and a tissue illustration.
description_view_1: The left side of the parcels is visible, highlighting the 'FRESH TISSUE' text and the clean, flat surfaces of the boxes.
description_view_2: The rear and right sides of the parcels are shown, with barcode graphics and minimal text visible on the side panels.
description_view_3: A top-down view of the parcels, emphasizing the uniformity and arrangement of the four boxes with visible branding.
